The only well-known company fitting all clues is Beyond Meat, co-founded by Ethan Brown and former NBA player Chris Paul is a prominent vegan athlete and investor, but he is not a co-founder. However, another famous vegan athlete, Brendan Brazier, co-founded Vega (plant-based protein) in 2008, is a long-term vegan, and fits the timeline and description.
